name: Ipd Group Ltd
analysis: IPG has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$5.7320. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$5.7320, stop A$5.4747, target A$6.2300. Risk/reward is 1.94:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
